Skip to content

  • December 2024 Commission Actions

    December 17, 2024 - The Commission

During the month of December, the WASC Senior College and University Commission (WSCUC) took action on the following institutions. Copies of Commission action letters and visiting team reports are available on the WSCUC website at www.wscuc.org/directory, with the exception of Substantive Change reports and Interim Reports, which are not made public.
 

SUBSTANTIVE CHANGE APPROVALS

Universidad de las Americas

PhD in Applied Biosciences

New degree level: 1st Research Doctorate level program

California State University, San Marcos

Doctor of Nursing Practice

New degree program (on-site)
